Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Continued To Apr-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Madissa Logan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Todd C. Robinson, parent and guardian ad litem for Minor: Alexandra Robinson; present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $4,000.00
Attorney's Fees: Waived.
No costs.
A net balance of $4,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Chase Bank, 3998 - 24th Street, San Francisco, CA 94114 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on May 20, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
